recent_calls.summary: The user called and requested to speak with Amy. The agent attempted to connect the user and successfully transferred the call to another agent.

The user called to check if their AC unit was under warranty before scheduling a service appointment. The agent gathered necessary information and confirmed that someone from the team would contact the user with warranty details. The user declined information about maintenance programs and confirmed the summary provided by the agent.

The user, Nya, called to schedule a standard service appointment for their cooling unit, which is running but not blowing air. The agent confirmed the details and booked an appointment for June 23rd at 2 PM. The user declined to provide feedback and the call ended successfully.

The user, identifying as American Home Shield, called to get a status update on a work order. After some clarification on the user's identity, the agent transferred the call to a live agent who could assist further. The call ended with a successful transfer.

The user called to reschedule a cooling service appointment due to the system freezing up. The agent provided available slots near the user's preferred time, but the user ultimately decided to keep the original appointment. The agent confirmed the details and informed the user that a human agent would follow up to finalize the appointment.

The user called to inquire about recharging their mini split system and provided their contact and service details. The agent informed the user that the earliest available service appointments are on June 24th, 25th, or 26th at 4 PM, and the user decided to call back later to confirm a suitable time. The call ended with the user satisfied and no immediate booking made.

Walter called to report that his air conditioning is not working and the air compressor outside isn't starting, which he considers an emergency. The agent documented the issue, confirmed the service address and contact details, and flagged the request as a priority for follow-up on the next business day. Walter requested service as soon as possible today but was informed that a technician could not be dispatched immediately due to after-hours, and the call ended with the agent assuring a prompt follow-up.

The user called Budget's after-hours service to inquire about the time window for a service appointment. The agent informed the user that specific timing could not be confirmed before regular business hours but noted the user's preference for a morning appointment and assured a follow-up on the next business day.

The user called to inquire about the scheduled arrival time of a technician. The agent informed the user that the time could not be confirmed before business hours but assured that the team would reach out after 8 AM to provide details. The user did not request any further assistance.

The user, Terrie, called to leave a voicemail requesting to reschedule a cooling appointment to Monday because she still does not have a seal. The agent confirmed the details and informed Terrie that the team will follow up the next business day. Terrie declined information about maintenance programs and expressed dissatisfaction with the virtual assistant.

Mignon Sanchez called to report that her AC is running but not pushing air, describing it as a comfort issue needing urgent attention. The agent confirmed her service address and contact details, marked the request as urgent, and informed her that a representative would follow up on the next business day. Mignon declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests before ending the call.
The call was very brief, with the agent introducing themselves and no further interaction from the user before the call ended.

Tamia from American Home Shield called Budget's after-hours assistant, Evie, to request a report for a specific work order number. Evie confirmed the work order number and assured Tamia that the request would be passed along for follow-up on the next business day. The call ended politely with no further requests.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

The user, Pat, called to inquire about service costs for checking Freon and inspecting a small water leak. The agent collected service details, confirmed contact information, and noted Pat's preferred appointment times. Pat expressed possible interest in maintenance programs and provided positive feedback about the call experience.

Linda called to inquire about a specific question regarding the technician scheduled to come on Friday. The agent informed her that it was after-hours and she could not connect her to a live person but documented her question. Linda decided to call back the next day.
The call was very brief, with the agent introducing herself and asking how she could help, but the user hung up immediately without responding.
The call was initiated by the user but was very brief and disconnected abruptly without completing the conversation or addressing any service needs.
The call was very brief, with the agent introducing themselves and no further interaction from the user before the call ended.

Pat Dickus called to schedule a first-time yearly air conditioner check and to address a water leak at their mobile home in Saint Peters, Missouri. The agent collected all necessary details, confirmed the appointment preference for Friday, and noted Pat's interest in home maintenance programs. The agent assured that a representative would contact Pat on the next business day to confirm the appointment and provide additional information.

The user called Budget's after-hours assistant to inquire about their options. The agent explained the services offered and asked if the user needed a follow-up or had a new issue, but the call ended shortly after without the user specifying further needs.
The user called to cancel a service and the agent acknowledged the cancellation request. The call was very brief and ended abruptly after the user said "Cancel."

The user, Keonna, called after hours to inquire about the service. The virtual assistant informed her that live transfers were unavailable and that a representative would call her back on the next business day. The call ended after the assistant confirmed no further assistance was needed.

Deana called to report that her AC unit freezes up daily and requires frequent manual thawing. She expressed frustration and provided her availability for a technician visit, preferring tomorrow briefly or Friday all day. The agent collected her details and assured her that the team will prioritize her request and follow up on the next business day.

The user called to report that the compressor installed during today's visit is not working despite being brand new. The agent confirmed the user's contact details and service address, assured the message would be passed to the team, and the call ended with no further requests from the user.

The user, Christina Ona, called to get a quote for a new heating and cooling system replacement at her property in St. Louis, Missouri. The agent collected the necessary details, offered available appointment times, and successfully booked a provisional appointment for June 23rd at 12 PM. The user declined to provide an email and to give feedback.
The user requested to speak to a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user expressed frustration about not receiving a callback after trying to reach the company for two days. The agent apologized and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user requested to speak to a representative, and the agent promptly initiated a transfer to a live agent. The call was successfully transferred without further interaction.
The call was initiated by the user but ended abruptly without any conversation taking place.

Don from American Home Shield called to inquire about a scheduled repair that was missed and possibly needed emergency service. The agent attempted to assist but transferred the call to a live agent for further help. The call ended with a successful transfer.

The user, Shameka, called to check the status of her AC unit following a recent service visit. The agent acknowledged the issue and confirmed the user's contact details to ensure the team would follow up. The call ended with no further requests from the user.

Grace called to follow up on her appointment regarding coverage for replacing her AC system. The agent confirmed her appointment details and informed her that the team would reach out to discuss next steps and coverage options. The call ended with Grace declining further assistance at the moment.
The user called and requested to speak to a live representative. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent successfully.
The user, Anthony, requested to speak to a live representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The call was successfully transferred without any issues.
The user requested to speak to a live representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to another agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user called Budget and requested to speak with a representative. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user called Budget and asked to speak with Shannon. The agent attempted to connect the user with Shannon and successfully transferred the call to another agent.
The user requested to speak with a customer service representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user called and requested to speak with someone in reception. The agent promptly transferred the call to the appropriate live agent. The call ended with a successful transfer.

The user called on behalf of Seanice Osborne but did not provide a service address or ZIP code and stated they did not need service. The user requested to speak to a live representative, and the agent transferred the call accordingly.
The call was initiated but ended immediately without any conversation taking place.

The user reported a plumbing emergency involving water backing up in the kitchen sink and dishwasher, potentially causing active water damage. The agent confirmed the details and transferred the call to a live agent for immediate assistance.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

The agent repeatedly asked the user for their service address ZIP code to proceed, but the user only repeated their offer about a free AI search visibility report and did not provide the requested information. The user ended the call by asking the agent to disregard the message.

Jerald Jenkins called to schedule a service appointment for his air conditioner that is not cooling. The agent confirmed details, offered available time slots, and booked an appointment for June 23rd at 10 AM. The call ended with a transfer request to customer service for further assistance.
Jeannie Judge called to inquire about a scheduled appointment for someone to arrive between eight and twelve. The agent attempted to assist but transferred the call to a live agent for further help.
The user called back as instructed by another person and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The call was brief and ended with a successful transfer to another agent.
The user requested to speak to a live representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to another agent. The transfer was completed successfully within a short call duration.
